cards.back: SMS Telephony is a technology that allows users to send and receive short text messages between mobile devices.
Location Based Services is a technology that enables devices to determine their geographical location and provide related information to users.
SMS Telephony works by sending and receiving short text messages between mobile devices using the cellular network.

cards.front: What is the impact of Location Based Services on mobile applications?
cards.back: Location Based Services can enhance the functionality and user experience of mobile applications by providing location-related data and services.

cards.front: What is the role of SQLite Database in Android in the context of SMS Telephony and Location Based Services?
cards.back: SQLite Database in Android is used to store and manage data related to SMS Telephony and Location Based Services, such as user information and location data.
